raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to file a formal complaint against Citibank regarding the incorrect handling and denial of XXXX distinct billing disputes on my Citi Mastercard ending in XXXX. 

Citibank closed these investigations and reversed my conditional credits, citing that I did not follow merchant cancellation policies or that the merchants refused the credit. However, I have official documentation, receipts, and invoices directly from every merchant explicitly stating that a refund was authorized, processed, or is due to my XXXX ending in XXXX for these exact amounts. 

Citibank has categorized these disputes incorrectly. These are not disagreements over cancellation policies ; this is a case of " XXXXXXXX XXXX  XXXX. '' The merchants agreed to the refunds, but the funds never posted to my account. 

Here is the breakdown of the wrongly denied cases and the corresponding proof I have attached : XXXX.
